post.description: Access to the actual document content for download, however, is managed via the "contents" child resource of the "documents" root resource. The child resource will contain a "canonical" link reference where the content can be downloaded using an HTTP POST or GET. This will return the content according to the media type stored with the document definition.

200.description: Content successfully returned as message body with content matching the Content-Type header.

post.description:
Adds document content to an existing document. The Content-Type header for the HTTP POST must match the type of content being uploaded.
This content will be scanned for viruses and the content verified to match the specified type.
Only one document content can be created for an existing document.

200.description: Indicates document content has been successfully uploaded and validated.

400.description: Indicates document content already exists for the specified document.

404.description: Indicates the specified document does not exist.

405.description: Indicates the operation being attempted was not supported.

500.description: Indicates there was an internal persistence error and to check the application exception logs.

documentMimeType.description: No description. This attribute is marked as Create-Only.

reportGid.description: The report associated with the document attachment, if content was generated by the report subsystem.

generatedAt.description: If preparation, date/time content was last generated

uploadedAt.description: If attachment, date/time content was last updated

documentCmsId.description: A GUID to associate the document with content stored on its remote CMS. Valid when document_type=CMS.

usedAs.description: Represents the classification of a document.(C/I/L/T)

relatedDocumentGid.description: Represents the related document for consolidated/linked documents.

effectiveDate.description: represents effective date for a document

expirationDate.description: Represents expiration date for a document.

documentContextValue.description: Represents the value of a document context qualifier.

documentContentGid.description: NOTE: This column should not have an FK to OCUMENT_CONTENT. The DOCUMENT_CONTENT table may be stored in a different instance or schema.

detail.description: Provides more information about the error.

value.description: Numeric value that specifies an amount
Numeric value that specifies a currency

<resource ID>.description: Id of the resource whose attribute(s) needs to be updated

<Attribute Name>.description: Attribute that needs to be updated

startTime.description: Time at which the transaction starts.

progress.description: Indicates the completion status of the message.

complete.description: Indicates the completion status of the message.

endTime.description: Time at which the transaction ended.

responsiblePartyGid.description: Describes the person or people that will be affected by the action.

statusCodeGid.description: A code associated with the action to be performed.

reasonCodeGid.description: A code describing the reason for the action.

pks.description: Object primary keys that supports one or more multi-part (compound) keys

q.description: Filter (a 'where'clause) to restrict the items returned in the collection. By default, no filtering is applied.

expand.name: expand
expand.description: Comma-delimited string of child resource names that you want to expand so that the contents return with the parent in the same GET request.

limit.name: limit
limit.description: Positive integer value that specifies the maximum number of items returned by the server.

offset.name: offset
offset.description: Non-negative integer values that specifies the index of the first item to be returned. The offset index begins at 0. By default, the offset is 0, which returns all items starting from the first item in the collection.

orderBy.name: orderBy
orderBy.description: Comma-separated string of field names, each optionally followed by asc or desc, that specifies the order of items returned in the response payload.

fields.name: fields
fields.description: Comma-delimited string of field names that you wanted returned in a GET request.

totalResults.name: totalResults
totalResults.description: Boolean value that specifies whether to calculate the totalResults property. By default, this value is set to false indicating that totalResults is not calculated.

q.name: q
q.description: Filter (a 'where'clause) to restrict the items returned in the collection. By default, no filtering is applied.

asyncHeader.name: Prefer
asyncHeader.description: An optional header parameter that allows you to process the request asynchronously. Set the request header "Prefer" to "respond-async" for asynchronous processing. For synchronous processing, leave the parameter blank or do not define it.

transientHeader.name: Prefer Transient Header
transientHeader.description: A header parameter that allows you to execute queries. Set the request header "Prefer" to "transient" to explicitly declare that the query should be executed.
